name: tab-group
title: TabGroup
description: Horizontal or vertical tab list (`ds-tab-group`) with roving keyboard focus and optional dividers between tab groups.

peerDependencies.frameworks: Custom Elements; React 18/19 wrappers; Angular 19-22 standalone adapters.

tabs.description: Tab ids/labels; `{ type: "divider" }` for group breaks. Use `isInactive` on a tab to disable it (25% opacity).
